flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southern Utah University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Southern Utah University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (29.4% → 33.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southern Utah University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (54.7% → 60.7%).
